/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/gateway_test.dir/test/gateway_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gateway_test.dir/src/gateway_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gateway_test.dir/src/tcp_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gateway_test.dir/src/http_server.cpp.o -o ../bin/gateway_test  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/chat-system/build/lib ../lib/libchat_common.a ../lib/libspdlog.so.1.11.0 ../lib/libjsoncpp.so.1.9.5 ../lib/libbcrypt.so.1.0.0
